Misty Branch Amulet

When the amulet's wearer and allied units restore a total of 650000 health, the amulet's wearer and all allied units have their incoming and outgoing healing increased by 30%, and all their stats by 30%, for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. The ability triggers once per 0,5 sec.
Once every 6 sec., the amulet's wearer restores 30% health to self and all allied units in a large radius around.

Requirements: 98-100
